damage.value: gore, trample, swat d10+3 (hand, close, forceful, messy, 1 piercing)

system.concept: A hill-sized burrowing drake that belches lightning.
system.description: Sometimes, out on the Flats, you'll see what looks to be small hills in the distance. Steer clear: they probably aren't hills, but huge piles of dirt a thunder drake has moved as it digs. You do not want to stumble into one on its home turf. When one bellows nearby, roll +CON: on a 10+ pick 1, on a 7-9 pick 2, on a 6- all three — drop what you're holding and cover your ears; stagger back a few steps; be deafened and disoriented for a few moments.

lore.prompt: **Something interesting:** Thunder drakes eat mostly grass and shrubs, but they have a taste for certain ores. They spend their time grazing, sleeping, and digging up rocks.
**Something useful:** They particularly savor copper and relish aetherium. If they find a source, they'll chew it right up and spend the next few days belching lightning bolts.

items.name: Belch forth a bolt of lightning, d10+3 damage (near, forceful, loud, ignores armor)
